users.description: Stores user profile information and links to their content.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the user's profile picture.

role.description: Role of the user, e.g., 'reader' or 'writer'.

followingCount.description: Total number of users they follow.

followingIds.description: An array of user IDs that this user follows.

fcmTokens.description: Array of Firebase Cloud Messaging tokens for push notifications.

readingList.description: Array of story objects the user has saved.

readChapters.description: Array of chapter IDs the user has read.

level.description: User's current level based on XP.

xp.description: User's experience points, earned through engagement.

achievements.description: Array of achievement objects the user has unlocked.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: When the user profile was last updated.

stories.description: The core collection for all stories created by users.

author.description: Summary object of the story's author.

summary.description: A short description or blurb for the story.

genre.description: The primary genre of the story.

tags.description: An array of string tags for discoverability.

coverImageUrl.description: URL for the story's cover image.

collaboratorIds.description: Array of user IDs who can edit the story.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the story or its chapters.

views.description: Total number of times the story has been viewed.

chapters.description: Individual chapters for each story. Stored as a map on the story document.

content.description: The main text content of the chapter.

order.description: The numerical order of the chapter in the story.

allowedUsers.description: List of users with access to premium chapters.

votes.description: Number of votes for the chapter.

comments.description: Stores all comments made on chapters.

storyId.description: ID of the story being commented on.

chapterId.description: ID of the chapter being commented on.

parentId.description: ID of the parent comment if it's a reply.

userId.description: The user who receives the notification.

link.description: URL to navigate to on click.

isRead.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

conversations.description: Represents a direct message thread between two or more users.

participantIds.description: Array of user IDs in the conversation.

participantInfo.description: Map of user summaries for participants.

lastMessage.description: A copy of the most recent message for previews.

senderId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

content.description: The text content of the message.

globalChatMessages.description: Stores all messages for the public real-time chat room.

author.description: Summary object of the message author.

mediaUrl.description: URL of the image or video for the status.

expiresAt.description: When the status will automatically expire.

isHidden.description: True if the user hid the status.

author.description: Summary object of the prompt's author.

prompt.description: The main text of the writing prompt.

genre.description: The genre suggestion for the prompt.

isArchived.description: True if the prompt has been archived by the author.

letters.description: Private or public letters sent from readers to authors about specific chapters.

authorId.description: The story author receiving the letter.

reader.description: The user who sent the letter.

storyId.description: The story the letter is about.

chapterId.description: The chapter the letter is about.

isPinned.description: If the author has pinned the letter to the story page.

isReadByAuthor.description: If the author has opened/read the letter.

authorResponse.description: An optional response from the author.

annotations.description: Stores user highlights and notes on story content.

userId.description: The user who created the annotation.

storyId.description: ID of the story being annotated.

chapterId.description: ID of the chapter being annotated.

highlightedText.description: The text that was highlighted by the user.

highlightColor.description: The color used for the highlight (e.g., hex code).

note.description: A private note or comment from the user about the highlight.

feedPosts.description: Posts that appear on the main feed, created by users.

author.description: Summary object of the post author.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image attached to the post.

storyId.description: ID of a story attached to the post.

songUrl.description: URL of a song attached to the post.

songLyricSnippet.description: A snippet of lyrics from the attached song.

reactions.description: Reactions to a feed post. The document ID is the user ID.

userId.description: The ID of the user who reacted.

user.description: Summary object of the user who reacted.

author.description: Summary object of the announcement author.

questions.description: Questions asked by readers to authors.

asker.description: Summary object of the user who asked.

authorId.description: ID of the author the question is for.

answerer.description: Summary object of the user who answered.

authorId.description: ID of the author who created the poll.

options.description: Array of poll options with their vote counts.
